
### implementing logins on HTTP  {.smaller}


* typical mechanism: <em>cookies</em>
* information for <em>client to send</em> with future requests to server 

   * limited to <em>particular domain</em> (or domain+path)

* Server sets cookie set via header in HTTP response 

   * <code> Set-Cookie: key=theInfo; domain=example.com; expires=Wed, Apr …</code>

* Client sends back cookie with <em>every HTTP request</em>* 

   * &nbsp;* --- with some exceptions
   * <code> Cookie: key=theInfo</code>

* JavaScript can also read or set Cookie
